Build configuration for the JerryScript application on the RIOT OS for the STM32F4 board.

# Purpose
This Makefile is used to configure the build environment for an application named `riot_jerry`, which is designed to run on the `stm32f4discovery` board. It sets up paths to essential directories, such as the RIOT operating system base directory (`RIOTBASE`), the JerryScript directory (`JERRYDIR`), the application source directory (`APPDIR`), and the binary output directory (`BINDIR`). The file includes a flag `CFLAGS += -DDEVELHELP` to enable development-specific safety checks in the RIOT code, which can be disabled for production. The `QUIET` variable controls the verbosity of the compiler output, with a default setting to suppress detailed compiler invocation lines. The Makefile also specifies modules to include, such as `shell`, `shell_commands`, and `libjerrycore`, and it incorporates the main RIOT Makefile with `include $(RIOTBASE)/Makefile.include`.
